title: Egg Improvements
description: Cook and scramble eggs like they were meant to!
body:
Behold! A much needed and long awaited game mechanic: cooking, scrambling, and eating eggs!
With this mod you get a new pan to cook, scramble and eat eggs on! 
And of course: use it as a blunt weapon.
Though it is simple, it is useful, fun, and great for modpacks.
Have fun!
